figures.caption: Figure 1: Our Bundle Sampler Construction: a pair of algorithms (Embed,Decode) such that Embed, given sample access to a distribution D and a bit b ∈ {0, 1}, output x such that (a) the marginal distribution of x is precisely D; and (b) Decode(x) = b with probability that grows with the min-entropy of D.

Figure 2: Our Pseudorandom Noise-Resilient Key Exchange Protocol to agree on a single key bit, tolerating a constant channel noise rate. To agree on a long λ-bit key, execute this protocol λ times in parallel.
